title: adenophora triphylla f. pilosissima
intro: Adenophora triphylla f. pilosissima, also known as Yezrhua or Siberian bugloss, is a flowering plant species native to China and Mongolia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and sedative properties. The medicinal properties of Adenophora triphylla f. pilosissima include the ability to relieve pain, reduce fever, and promote sleep. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, can be used to treat various health issues, including insomnia, anxiety, and menstrual disorders.
